name: The Chalice Vaporizer
desc: The drinkable vaporizer — vapor fills the glass chalice and you sip it like a toast. No smoke, no ash. The Xiaolin centerpiece.

name: The Drag-on Tip
desc: Reusable 10mm glass mouthpiece for properly rolled blunts — a cooler, smoother pull every time.

name: Signature Grinder
desc: 4-tier aluminum grinder for the optimal consistency — finished with the black Xiaolin logo.

name: Cannagar Cutter
desc: Precision cannagar clippers — a clean, even cut every time, the Made in Xiaolin way.

name: Signature Ashtray
desc: Crystal ashtray with the red Xiaolin logo and indents sized perfectly for joints or cannagars.

name: Xiaolin Hat
desc: The Xiaolin cap — clean gold crest, built for summer. Rep the studio.

name: Torch Lighter
desc: The Xiaolin pocket torch — precision flame with the control a cannagar deserves.

name: Blunt Cones w/ Glass Tip (6-Pack)
desc: Six pre-rolled blunt cones, each fitted with a glass tip for a smooth, even draw.
